meta.title: FundedYouth Changelog Feed
meta.description: Static data source for the FundedYouth changelog hub. Edit `apps` and `updates` below, then redeploy. Fetched by the app at runtime from /data/changelog.json.

apps.name: Public Site
apps.description: The face of FundedYouth. Program information, public blogs, and join page.

apps.name: User Portal
apps.description: Personal student/founder dashboards, member profiles, and gamified challenges.

apps.name: The Vault
apps.description: Exclusive digital drops, startup contract templates, and funding reserves telemetry.

apps.name: Q-Up
apps.description: Queue up, track, and manage jobs from request to done — the ecosystem's job tracking system.

apps.name: Curriculum
apps.description: Startup builder guides, interactive masterclasses, and project submission steps.

apps.name: Docs
apps.description: Self-service knowledge bases, ecosystem API guidelines, and developer toolkits.

apps.name: Fun Labs
apps.description: Our experimental playground — a peek at future projects and the smaller side builds we're tinkering with.

updates.title: 💳 Switch from Credits to Card — Without Losing a Day
updates.description:
You can now move an active membership off the credit system and onto a card (or bank account) — and every day you already paid for still counts. 💳

### What Changed
* **🔄 Switch while active**: Move from the credit system to a card or bank account even while your membership is still running on credits.
* **🗓️ No surprise charges**: Your remaining credit days convert to free days. For example, 20 days left becomes 20 days free — then your Stripe payment method is charged at the next billing cycle.
* **💳 Any payment method**: Works for swapping one card for another, or replacing a card with a bank account.
* **🏪 Self-serve or onsite**: Make the switch yourself in your **User Portal** account, or have staff do it at the **Admin Storefront POS**.

updates.title: 🔢 Q-Up Is Live — Sign In with Your Username & 4-Digit PIN
updates.description:
Q-Up, our new job tracking system, is up and running in beta — and signing in is as easy as remembering 4 digits. 🔢

### What Changed
* **👤 Set your PIN**: Log into your **User Portal** account and add a 4-digit PIN code under your profile.
* **🔑 Simple sign-in**: Once your PIN is set, log in with just your **Username + PIN** — no long password needed.
* **🧪 Beta mode**: Q-Up is live in beta, so expect fast updates as we polish the experience.

updates.title: 🎓 Mark Course Completion from the POS
updates.description:
Admins can now track course progress right from the Storefront POS in the **Admin Portal**. 🎓

### What Changed
* **✅ Mark as complete**: In **Storefront POS > Progress and Badges**, you can mark a student as having completed a course.
* **↩️ Undo anytime**: Made a mistake? You can just as easily unmark a completion to set it back.

updates.title: 🚀 Rocket Workshop: Build It, Launch It, Watch It Fly!
updates.description:
Blast off! The **Rocket Workshop** is built, ready, and running — an interactive, hands-on adventure from paper tube to sky-high launch. 🚀

### What Changed
* **📄 Build your rocket**: Start by folding a basic paper rocket — simple, quick, and yours.
* **🌀 Fins make the difference**: Throw it without fins and watch it wobble and shake. Snap on some fins and watch it glide smooth and straight — science you can see!
* **🚲 Pump up the power**: Load your rocket onto the launch station and use a bike pump to fill the pressure system. Feel the tension build!
* **🔴 3… 2… 1… LAUNCH!**: Count down from 3, hit the launch button, and send your rocket soaring into the sky. 🎉

updates.title: 💳 Stripe Memberships & Smarter Renewals
updates.description:
Memberships can now be paid with a card through Stripe, with flexible billing lengths and a safety net for missed payments. 💳

### What Changed
* **💳 Pay by card**: Stripe-priced membership plans now open an embedded checkout when you subscribe. Credit-based plans work exactly as before.
* **📆 Flexible billing lengths**: Plans can bill every 1, 3, 6, or 12 months — a 3-month plan now creates a true 3-month Stripe billing cycle.
* **🔁 Hands-off renewals**: Stripe-subscribed memberships renew through Stripe, so the system no longer double-handles their renewals.
* **🛟 Missed payment safety net**: If a card payment fails, we'll automatically cover the renewal with your credits when you have enough (and let you know). If not, the membership lapses and the wallet is frozen.
* **🛠️ Clearer admin plan form**: The admin plan editor now shows a live **billing mode** badge, uses a month-count input instead of a monthly/yearly dropdown, and has clearer field labels.

updates.title: 🙋 Volunteer Shifts: One-Per-Day Limit & Early Checkout
updates.description:
Two handy upgrades for managing volunteer shifts. 🙋

### What Changed
* **🔂 One Shift Per Day**: A new toggle in the Add/Edit Timeslot form lets admins limit a timeslot to **one shift per volunteer per day**. If it's on and a volunteer already has a shift that date, signing up for another is blocked with a clear message.
* **💾 Edits now save properly**: We also fixed a bug where editing a timeslot only updated the screen without saving — changes now stick.
* **🚪 Early Checkout**: Assigned volunteers can now be checked out early with a new amber **Early Checkout** button. Pick the actual end time, and the shift is marked **Completed** with that time shown as a badge.
* **🎟️ Fair credits**: Credits are automatically prorated to the hours actually worked, and the credit history notes the early departure.

updates.title: 🖨️ New App: Print Cards
updates.description:
Say hello to **Print Cards**, a new in-house tool for our team. 🖨️

### What Changed
* **🆕 New app**: Print Cards lives at **/apps/print-cards** and is for **in-house use only**.
* **📄 Turn a file into a card**: When someone creates an account in person (instead of signing up online), their login info can be saved to a `.txt` file. Print Cards reads that file and builds a printable card.
* **🖨️ Ready to print**: Once the card is created, you can print it right from the app to hand to the new member.

updates.title: 📧 One-Step Parent Consent for Under-13 Signups
updates.description:
We made signing up simpler for members under 13 and their parents. 📧

### What Changed
* **✉️ Just one email**: Instead of two separate emails (one to verify the address and another for parental consent), parents now get a single combined message.
* **✅ One click does both**: Clicking the confirmation link both verifies the parent's email and records their consent at the same time.
* **📜 Consent starts at signup**: Agreeing to the **Portal Member Agreement** during signup counts as the initial consent, in line with children's privacy rules (COPPA).
* **🔁 Everything else is the same**: The signup flow for ages 13+ and the admin resend-consent option are unchanged.

updates.title: 🐛 Fixed Crashes When Creating Invoices & Courses
updates.description:
We squashed two server crashes that popped up when an admin left an optional field blank while creating records. 🐛

### What Changed
* **🧾 Invoices**: Creating an invoice with no due date now defaults the due date to the issue date instead of failing.
* **📚 Courses**: Creating a course without a badge or category selected now saves correctly instead of failing.
* **🔒 Your data is safe**: No data was affected — these were input-handling bugs, not security issues.

updates.title: 🔑 Shorter Passwords Allowed (With a Heads-Up)
updates.description:
We relaxed the password length rule, while still nudging you toward staying secure. 🔑

### What Changed
* **🔢 8 characters minimum**: Passwords can now be as short as **8 characters**.
* **⚠️ Friendly warning**: If you pick a shorter password, we'll show a heads-up that it's weaker for your account's security.
* **🛡️ Extra protection**: We recommend turning on **two-factor authentication (2FA)** in your user profile for a stronger layer of security.

updates.title: ✉️ Refreshed Custom Time Request Email
updates.description:
We updated the **Custom Time Request Submitted** email template in **Administration > Email Notifications** (Admin Portal). ✉️

### What Changed
* **📋 Clearer summary**: The email now lays out the request at a glance — the member's **name**, **username**, and **email**.
* **🎯 Full request details**: It shows the chosen **course**, the **mode** (take together or separate, with the class count), each **class with its date and time**, and any **note** the member added.
* **🧪 Sample placeholders**: The template uses sample data (like `studentName` and `studentUsername`) so you can preview exactly how a real request will look.

updates.title: 🧭 Simpler Registrations Tabs
updates.description:
We simplified the tabs in **Events > Registrations** in the **Admin Portal**. 🧭

### What Changed
* **🧭 One row of tabs**: The old nested tabs are now a single row — **Upcoming Events**, **Past Events**, and **Settings**.
* **🔍 Search has its own space**: The search box moved to its own row just below the tabs.
* **🧹 Less clutter**: We removed the redundant **Registrations** tab.

updates.title: 🙈 Hide Whole Events & Auto-Cleanup
updates.description:
More polish for **Events > Registrations** in the **Admin Portal**. 🙈

### What Changed
* **📱 Looks great anywhere**: Registrant details now show as a table on desktop and as easy-to-read stacked cards on mobile.
* **🙈 Hide a whole event**: A new **Hide** button tucks an entire event out of the list (still kept on the Schedule and in the audit log), replacing the old per-person dismiss.
* **🗂️ New Settings tab**: Registrations now has **Registrations** and **Settings** sub-tabs.
* **⏳ Auto-hide old events**: In Settings you can have events hide automatically after a set number of days, and see any manually hidden events with a **Restore** button.

updates.title: 📱 Active Events & Mobile-Friendly Registrations
updates.description:
A couple of nice fixes for **Events > Registrations** in the **Admin Portal**. 📱

### What Changed
* **▶️ Active events stay up top**: The **Upcoming** list now includes events that are currently in progress, even if their end time has already passed.
* **📱 Easier on mobile**: Tapping an event on your phone now shows its registrants right below it. Desktop keeps the side-by-side layout.

updates.title: 🗂️ Event-by-Event Registrations View
updates.description:
**Events > Registrations** in the **Admin Portal** got a big upgrade — instead of one giant list, you now browse by event. 🗂️

### What Changed
* **📋 Pick an event**: The left side lists **Upcoming** and **Past** events, each showing its date/time and how many people are registered versus the capacity. Search filters the list by event name.
* **👥 See who's coming**: The right side shows everyone registered for the event you picked (the first one is selected automatically), sorted by status — **registered → attended → no-show → cancelled**.
* **✅ Same quick actions**: You can still mark attended, no-show, cancel, or dismiss each person, and the registered date still shows in Pacific time.

updates.title: 🙈 Dismiss Registrations & Correct Dates
updates.description:
More cleanup for **Event Registrations** in the **Admin Portal**. 🙈

### What Changed
* **🙈 Dismiss a registration**: A new **Dismiss** button on every row hides a registration (like ones for past events) without deleting it.
* **🧾 Tracked in the audit log**: Each dismiss is recorded so there's a clear history of what was hidden.
* **🕐 Correct dates everywhere**: The date column now always shows **Pacific time**, fixing an off-by-one day for people on other time zones.

updates.title: 🗂️ Tabs & Dismiss for Custom Requests
updates.description:
We reworked **Events > Requests** in the **Admin Portal** to keep things tidy. 🗂️

### What Changed
* **🗂️ Two tabs**: Requests are now split into **Submitted Requests** and **Settings**.
* **🙈 Dismiss a request**: A new **Dismiss** button hides a request from the list without deleting it, so admins can clear out ones they've handled.
* **🧾 Fuller audit log**: The audit log now tracks **Confirm**, **Decline**, **Add to Schedule**, and the new **Dismiss** action, with clearer descriptions.

updates.title: 👤 Quick User Details in Event Registrations
updates.description:
Checking who registered for an event just got faster in the **Admin Portal**. 👤

### What Changed
* **🪟 Click for details**: In **Events > Registrations**, clicking a user opens a popup with their **email** and **grade**.
* **🔗 Jump to profile**: The popup includes a button that takes you straight to that user's profile under **All Users**.

updates.title: ✉️ Clearer Event Registration Emails
updates.description:
We tidied up the registration email notifications in the **Admin Portal**. ✉️

### What Changed
* **🏷️ New name**: **Class / Sessions Registration** is now **Event Registration** for Email Notifications.
* **➕ More details**: This section now also includes **username**, **email**, and **grade**.

updates.title: 📅 Request a Custom Class Schedule
updates.description:
Can't make our standard weekly course hours? Now you can ask for a time that works for you. 📅

### What Changed
* **📝 New request form**: Pick a course, then check off the classes in that course you want to take.
* **⏳ Plan ahead**: Choose a date at least **2 days** in the future, then pick a start time.
* **🧮 Smart time slots**: We only show start times that actually fit. If you need 2 hours in a row and the open window is 10 AM–12 PM, you'll see **10 AM** offered — but not 11 AM, since that would leave only 1 hour.
* **🛠️ Admins set the hours**: The Admin Portal controls which hours can be booked for custom requests.
* **🤝 It's just a request**: After you submit, a team member will reach out to confirm your schedule.

updates.title: 🏷️ Admin Portal Menu Renames: Curriculum & Events
updates.description:
We renamed a few menus in the **Admin Portal** to make them clearer. 🏷️

### What Changed
* **📚 Students → Curriculum**: The **Students** main menu is now **Curriculum**.
* **🧭 Curriculum sub-menu**: Under Curriculum, the old **Curriculum** item is now **Overview**, and **Accounts** is back to being called **Students**.
* **📅 Sessions → Events**: The **Sessions** main menu is now **Events**.
* **🗓️ Events → Schedule**: Under Events, the old **Events** item is now **Schedule**.

updates.title: 🙌 New Way to Start Volunteering
updates.description:
Signing up to volunteer is now simpler and happens right inside the **User Portal**. 🙌

### What Changed
* **🔗 No more Jotform**: We removed the old Jotform link from the Volunteer page.
* **🚀 Start in the User Portal**: Volunteering now begins by creating a free account in the User Portal.
* **✅ Quick steps**: Just agree to the required terms of service and sign the **Volunteer Agreement**.
* **📬 We'll follow up**: Once you sign the agreement, a team member will reach out to you.

updates.title: ✨ Learn Page Refresh + Easier Maker Apps Access
updates.description:
The **Learn** page got a fresh coat of paint to match the rest of the site, plus some handy new shortcuts. ✨

### What Changed
* **🎨 Matching style**: The Learn page styling now lines up with the look and feel of the rest of the site.
* **🛠️ Maker Apps & Tools button**: The hero section's secondary button is now **"Maker Apps & Tools"** — clicking it scrolls you straight down to the link for the full Maker Apps & Tools page.
* **🧭 New explore section**: Added a brand-new **"Explore our Maker Apps & Tools"** section near the bottom of the page.
* **💬 Faster contact**: On the Teachers page, **"Start a conversation now"** now jumps right to the Contact page.

updates.title: 📄 Trimmed Redundancy from the Adult & Parent/Guardian Agreement
updates.description:
We cleaned up the **Adult and Parent/Guardian Agreement** so there's less repeated reading. 📄

### What Changed
* **✂️ Removed duplicates**: Most of the content that was repeated here already lives in the **General Use Agreement**, so we took it out.
* **✅ Easier to read**: The agreement is now shorter and clearer, without losing anything you need to know.

updates.title: 📅 Event Registrations Sync to Public Schedule
updates.description:
Event slots now stay in sync with the public calendar. 📅

### What Changed
* **✅ Live availability**: When a student registers for an event, it now shows up on the public calendar schedule page for available slots.
* **🔄 Two-way updates**: This applies to both registration and cancellation, so open slots always reflect reality.

updates.title: 📊 "Student" Is Now "My Progress"
updates.description:
We've reorganized the **Student** area into a clearer **My Progress** section. 📊

### What Changed
* **🧭 Nav rename**: **Student** is now **My Progress**.
* **🏷️ Sub-menu renames**: **My Progress → Overview**, **My Badges → Badges**, **My Pathways → Pathways**.
* **📰 Consistent headers**: The page title now always reads **My Progress**, with the subtitle showing the section you're on (Overview, Badges, or Pathways).

updates.title: 🏷️ Renamed Sessions & Course Navigation
updates.description:
We've refreshed some navigation labels in the **User Portal** to be clearer. 🏷️

### What Changed
* **Sessions → Events**
* **Browse Events → Schedule**
* **Available Courses → Join a Course**

updates.title: 🧭 Reordered Portal Navigation
updates.description:
We've reordered the **User Portal** navigation for a more intuitive flow. 🧭

### New Order
* **Dashboard → Sessions → Student → Subscription → Billing → Agreements → Profile**

updates.title: 🏷️ Subscriptions Nav Renamed to "Membership"
updates.description:
Small wording tweak in the navigation. 🏷️

### What Changed
* **Subscriptions → Membership**: The **Subscriptions** nav item is now labeled **Membership**.

updates.title: 🎟️ Active Memberships: Auto-Enroll in Included Courses
updates.description:
Active memberships now include **Auto-Enroll** for the courses covered by your membership. 🎉

### What's New
* **🚀 Automatic access**: Courses included in your membership are added for you — no need to join them manually.
* **✅ Always enrolled**: As long as your membership is active, you're auto-enrolled in the included courses.

updates.title: 📝 Streamlined Account Registration & Member Agreement
updates.description:
New accounts now default to **My Child / Other**, and registration is more streamlined. 🎉

### What's New
* **📜 Agreement built in**: The **Portal Member Agreement** now appears at the bottom of the registration form — you'll need to scroll all the way down (aka read it) before you can agree to the terms and create your account.
* **✅ Two-step validation**: After creating your account, validate your email and provide parental validation on the second email to unlock access to the portal.

updates.title: 💳 Dashboard: FYBIT Balance & Upcoming Classes
updates.description:
The **User Portal Dashboard** now keeps you in the loop at a glance. 🎉

### What's New
* **💰 FYBIT balance**: See a notice with your current FYBIT credit balance right on the dashboard.
* **🛒 Buy more credits**: A quick link to top up your credits when you're running low.
* **📅 Upcoming classes**: View your upcoming classes at a glance.

updates.title: 🔑 Login: We Recommend Using Your Username
updates.description:
We're recommending users sign in with their **username** instead of their email. 🔐

### Why
* **👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Shared emails**: If a parent used the same email for multiple children, usernames keep each account distinct.
* **✅ Smoother sign-in**: Switching to your username avoids confusion at login.

updates.title: ⏰ More Daily Instructional Hours Coming
updates.description:
We're working on a solution to provide more daily instructional hours. 🚀

### What's Coming
* **🕒 Custom time slots**: If the standard hours don't work for you, we're integrating a custom time slot feature.
* **📬 Stay connected**: More details to come — stay tuned.

updates.title: Get Start now Redirected to Portal
updates.description: Remove the Get Started page. All links pointed to get started now redirect to https://portal.fundedyouth.org/#watch-and-learn

updates.title: 🚀 New Rocket Workshop Coming Soon
updates.description:
We're building a new hands-on workshop all about rockets and compression. 🚀

### The Idea
* **🛠️ Simplified design**: Reworking an existing model that relies on an air compressor.
* **🚲 Bike pump system**: Replacing the compressor with a bike pump and a control panel for a simulated launch console.

### How It Works
* **🎯 Assemble**: Students build their own paper rocket.
* **💨 Prime**: Pump to build up air pressure.
* **🔴 Launch**: Hit the launch button to send the rocket flying.

updates.title: 🗂️ Q-UP: Service Request Tracking
updates.description:
A new in-house tool is taking shape in the lab. 🚀

### What It Does
* **📋 Track service requests**: Keep tabs on incoming requests so jobs like prints get completed.
* **🙌 Keep volunteers on track**: Helps volunteers know what's in the queue and what's next.
* **🔄 Team in the loop**: Keeps the whole team aware of progress from request to done.

updates.title: 🗄️ The Vault: In-House File Server
updates.description:
A new in-house file server for active members. 🔐

### What It Does
* **🗄️ Member file server**: A central place for active members to access files.
* **🧩 Exclusive 3D files**: Gain access to exclusive 3D files for onsite use only.
* **✂️ Laser crafting designs**: Gain access to exclusive laser crafting designs.

updates.title: 🎨 Filament Visualizer: Preview Materials on 3D Models
updates.description:
A new experimental tool, currently under development. 🚧

### What It Does
* **📥 Import a model**: Bring in a 3D model.
* **🎨 Assign a material**: Apply a material to preview how the model will look.
* **🚧 Under development**: Still actively being built.

updates.title: 🧰 New /apps Page: Tiny Tools & Course Apps
updates.description:
Introducing a new **/apps** page on the public site. 🎉

### What's New
* **🔗 One place for everything**: The page collects links to the tiny apps and tools used across FundedYouth courses and more.
* **🚀 Quick access**: Jump straight to a course tool without hunting for the link.

updates.title: 📊 Storefront POS: View Student Progress & Badges Earned
updates.description:
The **Storefront POS** now gives you a quick window into each student's journey. 🎉

### What's New
* **📈 View Progress**: See a student's course progress right from the POS.
* **🏅 Badges Earned**: Check which badges a student has earned without leaving the POS.

updates.title: 🚦 Pathways: Set a Pathway to Live or Draft
updates.description:
Pathways now have a **mode** so you can work on them before they go public.

### What Changed
* **🟢 Live or Draft**: A pathway can now be set to **Live** or **Draft**, giving you control over what's visible while you build.

updates.title: 📂 Accounts > Progress: Expand a Course to See Student Status
updates.description:
Tracking how a class is doing is now much easier. 🎉

### What's New
* **🔽 Expandable Courses**: Clicking a course expands the students in the class.
* **🚦 Status at a Glance**: Each student shows their status — **Not Started**, **In Progress**, or **Completed**.

updates.title: 🗂️ Admin Menu: Students Is Now “Accounts”
updates.description:
A small navigation tidy-up in the Admin Portal.

### What Changed
* **✏️ Renamed**: **Students > Students** is now **Accounts**.
* **⬆️ Moved Up**: **Accounts** now sits at the top of the sub-menu for quicker access.

updates.title: 🏅 Earn Badges for Completing Courses
updates.description:
Gamification is here! We've created brand-new **graphical badges** and added them to the portal. 🎉

### How It Works
* **🎓 Complete a Course, Earn a Badge**: Finish a course and a shiny new badge is yours.
* **🏆 Show Off Your Progress**: Collect badges as you work your way through our courses.

This feature is **live now** — start earning! 🚀

updates.title: 🗂️ New Admin Page: Event Management
updates.description:
A brand-new **Event Management** page in the Admin Portal brings everything you need to run an event into one place. 🎉

### What You Can Do
* **📋 See Every Event**: List all current and upcoming events at a glance.
* **👥 View Registered Students**: See exactly who's signed up for each event.
* **✅ Check Students In**: Check a student in to an event when they arrive.
* **🏁 Mark as Completed**: Set a student as completed once they've finished.
* **🚫 Handle No-Shows**: Remove a student from the event if they don't show up.
* **🏅 Award Badges**: Select a student and award a badge right from the event.

updates.title: 🛠️ Admin Portal: Synced Logs, POS Shortcuts & Cleaner Navigation
updates.description:
We've made the Admin Portal smoother to manage day-to-day, from shared logs to a tidier menu.

### Fixed: Notification Syncing
* **🔄 No More Duplicates**: Fixed an internal error in notification syncing. **Notifications**, the **Audit Log**, and the **Error Log** no longer duplicate for every admin. When one admin marks an item as **read** or **completed**, it's marked that way for all admins — so no one gets buried under duplicate alerts and logs.

### POS Shortcuts
* **🎓 Faster Enrollment**: The **Enroll a Student** action on the Dashboard now takes you straight to the **Storefront POS**.
* **📆 Calendar View**: Added a **calendar view** in the POS for Courses and Events — now including the **Course ID**.

### Cleaner Navigation
* **🧭 Rearranged Menu**: **Storefront POS** and **Events Manager** now sit directly under the Dashboard, with a divider after Events Manager for clear separation.
* **👤 All Users**: **User Management** has been renamed **All Users** and moved to the bottom of the menu.

updates.title: 📝 Simpler Sign-Up: Account Types & One Combined Agreement
updates.description:
We've streamlined how you create your account and sign agreements — so getting started is quicker and clearer! 🎉

### Choose Your Account Type
* **👤 Personal Account**: Register as a single user.
* **👨‍👩‍👧 Multi-Child Account**: Register as a parent or guardian for your children. For each child, we automatically create a custom email from your address and the student's name — so you still receive every confirmation. Example: `<your-email>+<student-name>@example.com`.

### One Agreement Instead of Three
* **📄 Combined Agreement**: We merged the **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** agreements into one. Now the only things you sign at registration are the **parental agreement** and this **new combined agreement** — which unlocks the entire portal, including the student menus.
* **✅ Already Signed?**: If you previously signed all three agreements, you've been **automatically signed** to the new one — nothing to do.

updates.title: ☀️ New Summer Class Schedule
updates.description:
Our summer schedule is here — with **three one-hour classes every day**! 🌞

### Daily Class Times
* **1:00 – 2:00 PM**
* **2:00 – 3:00 PM**
* **3:00 – 4:00 PM**

Running **Monday through Friday**.

### Rotating Courses by Day
Entry-level courses are assigned by day — **Monday: 3DP1**, **Tuesday: 3DP2**, **Wednesday: 3DM1**, **Thursday: CDE1**. The Monday/Tuesday and Wednesday course days **alternate each week**, so check your portal calendar for the current week's lineup.

updates.title: 🛠️ Admin Portal: Sessions Databank & Events Upgrades
updates.description:
We've polished the **Sessions** tools in the Admin Portal to make linking classes and events faster and clearer.

### Databank Card View
* **🧹 Simplified Cards**: A cleaner card view that surfaces the key information at a glance.
* **🔗 Link Class to Event**: New field for linking a class directly to its event.
* **🆔 Cleaner Layout**: Removed the ID prefix from the Event Name. The **ID pill** now sits under the description, followed by the category, then the **linked course** and **linked class**.
* **⚡ Auto-Assign Event ID**: A new button auto-assigns the Event ID to the linked Class ID, plus an optional **Auto-Assign Event ID** toggle when a class is linked to an event.
* **❗ Required Field**: Event ID is now a required field.

### Events: From Template
* **🔎 Richer Search**: The **From Template** search popup now includes **Event ID**, **Course ID**, and **Class ID**.

updates.title: 🔗 Changelog Link Added to the Footer
updates.description: Finding out what we're building just got easier! We've added a link to our **Changelog** (a Fun Labs project) right in the **site footer** — so the latest updates are always one click away.

updates.title: 📅 Updated Summer Class Schedule
updates.description:
We've updated our weekly summer class schedule based on the most common requests we've been hearing from you! 🌞

### What Changed
* **🕐 New Hours**: Classes now run **1:00 – 4:00 PM, Monday through Thursday**.
* **📚 All Four Classes Weekly**: All four entry-level classes are now available **every week**.

updates.title: 📄 Agreements Combined: The Portal Member Agreement
updates.description:
We've combined three separate agreements — **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** — into a single **Portal Member Agreement**, streamlining the account creation process.

### What This Means
* **📝 One Agreement**: A single Portal Member Agreement replaces the previous three.
* **⚡ Faster Sign-Up**: Fewer documents to read and sign means a quicker, simpler registration.

updates.title: 🏪 Storefront POS: In-Person Account Creation & Sign-Ups
updates.description:
The **Storefront POS** in the Admin Portal just got a major upgrade — making it possible to get members fully set up in person! 🎉

### What's New
* **👤 Built-In Account Creation**: The new account creation process is now integrated right into the POS. Register a **single user** or sign up as a **parent or guardian** for a child — complete with our **concatenated email** feature.
* **✍️ Sign Agreements In Person**: All required agreements can now be signed on the spot at the storefront.

### The Big Win
**98% of account creation and class registration** can now happen entirely through the Storefront POS. The only thing left for the user to do is click the **email confirmations** — one to confirm their new account, and the **parental agreement** for COPPA compliance.

updates.title: ✨ Refreshed Account Creation & Registration
updates.description:
We've updated the **landing page** to make creating an account and getting registered smoother than ever! 🎉

### What Changed
* **🙌 Clearer Account Creation**: A cleaner, more intuitive sign-up flow right from the landing page.
* **📝 Streamlined Registration**: We tidied up the registration process so getting started takes fewer steps and less guesswork.

### Why It Matters
New members can go from landing on the page to fully registered faster and with less friction.

updates.title: 📅 User Registration V2
updates.description:
We've cleaned up class registration and moved everything into the **Sessions Menu** — so signing up for your courses and classes is simpler than ever! 🎉

### How It Works
* **🎯 Pick a Course**: Select **Available Courses** to join a course. This reveals the upcoming classes available for that course.
* **🗓️ Register for Same-Day Classes**: You can now register for two class sessions on the same day! Just sign up for **Class A** at, say, 4 PM and **Class B** at 5 PM (or any later time). That way you complete the course classes in the correct order.

### Smart Prerequisites
Available Courses only show up once you **meet the prerequisites**. So if you haven't finished **Course A**, you won't be able to join **Course B** or its class sessions — it stays hidden on your portal calendar until you're ready.

updates.title: 🚀 Introducing the App Launcher
updates.description:
Say hello to the **App Launcher** — a friendly home base for the makerspace computers that puts everything one click away! 🧪

### What Is It?
The App Launcher is a shortcut landing page that runs **locally on the makerspace computers**. Instead of hunting through bookmarks and desktop icons, you get one tidy launchpad with cards for every app and service you need.

### What's On the Launchpad
* **🛠️ FundedYouth Apps**: Quick-launch cards for the apps we build in-house.
* **🔌 Services We Use**: Handy shortcuts to the third-party tools and services that power the makerspace.

### Why It's Handy
Walk up to any makerspace computer and get to work in seconds — no more digging for the right link.

updates.title: 🛒 POS Integration: Buy, Subscribe & Enroll In Person
updates.description:
Our new **Point of Sale (POS) integration** brings the full power of the User Portal to the front desk — so members can get set up in person, no laptop required! 🎉

### What's New
* **💰 Buy FYBIT Credits**: Purchase FYBIT Credits right at the POS and start using them on the spot.
* **🎟️ Manage Memberships**: Sign up for and handle membership subscriptions in person, handled directly through the POS.
* **📚 Enroll On the Spot**: Register students for **courses, workshops, and class sessions** without leaving the counter.

### Why It Matters
Whether you're joining at an event or stopping by onsite, getting started is now faster and easier than ever — buy credits, pick a membership, and lock in your classes all in one place.

updates.title: New App in Development
updates.description:
🚀 Something exciting is brewing! We're building a brand-new in-house file server exclusively for active members — and we're calling it **The Vault**.

### What is The Vault?
The Vault is your members-only treasure chest of premium resources, available **onsite for active members only**. Think custom 3D models, exclusive assets, and limited edition prints you won't find anywhere else.

### What to Expect
* **🎨 Custom 3D Models**: A curated, ever-growing library built just for our community.
* **💎 Limited Edition Prints**: Exclusive drops reserved for active members — and more on the way.
* **🔒 Members-Only Access**: Premium resources available exclusively onsite.

This project is still in **early development**, and we're just getting started. 📬 **Subscribe to the feed** to be the first to know as The Vault takes shape!

### Stay in the Loop
Don't miss a single drop! [**Sign up for our newsletter**](https://fundedyouth.org/contact) to get the latest updates delivered straight to your inbox.

And give us a follow for behind-the-scenes sneak peeks and announcements:
* 📸 **Instagram**: [@FundedYouth](https://www.instagram.com/FundedYouth/)
* 👍 **Facebook**: [FundedYouth](https://www.facebook.com/FundedYouth)

updates.title: Cura Slicer Basics -  New Course Model (3DP1)
updates.description:
Cura Slicer Basics is now split into two **1-hour sessions**, giving students room to learn the tool and then put it to work on a realistic job.

### Session 1: Hands-On Slicer Lesson
Our existing hands-on lesson on how to use the **Ultimaker Cura Slicer** application. Students get comfortable navigating the software and preparing a model to print.

### Session 2: Challenges & Estimating
This new session introduces real-world challenges and provides students with a **template for producing an estimate**. The instructor plays the role of a client or customer and makes three requests. For each one, the student will:
1. **Find a model** that fits the request.
2. **Get the customer's approval** on the model.
3. **Write up the estimate** using the provided template.
4. **Confirm the price** with the customer.
5. **Print the file**.

updates.title: New Course: Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)
updates.description:
A brand-new course has landed! **Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)** is here, and just like 3DP1, it's split into two fun **1-hour sessions**. 🎉

*Heads up: You'll need to finish the **3DP1 course** first before jumping into this one!*

### Session 1: Learning the Tools
Get hands-on with the **Bambu Studio** app! This first class walks you through all the basic tools so you feel comfortable getting your models ready to print.

### Session 2: Making a Cost Estimate
Want to sell your prints? This class teaches you how to make a real cost estimate through three fun challenges. The instructor plays the role of a client and asks for three different items. For each one, you'll:
1. **Find something** the customer wants.
2. **Produce an estimate** for the job.
3. **Get the customer's confirmation**.
4. **Take the payment**.
5. **Print the product**.
6. **Present it** to the customer.

updates.title: Updated Course: TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)
updates.description:
We've leveled up our **TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)** course! 🎉 It now includes a brand-new **Cost Estimate document** to help students learn how to figure out the time and cost of making 3D models.

*Good news: there are **no prerequisites** for this course — anyone can jump right in!*

### How It Works
The course is split into two **1-hour sessions**, and it's **100% hands-on**. Every lesson builds on the one before it, and you'll always be modeling something brand-new!

### What You'll Do
* **🛠️ Two Modeling Lessons Per Class**: Each session is packed with two hands-on modeling lessons.
* **📐 Learn to Estimate**: Discover how to calculate the time and cost to produce your 3D models.
* **🚀 Build As You Go**: Each lesson grows your skills so you keep getting better and better.

updates.title: 💻 New Course: Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)
updates.description:
Get ready to code! **Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)** by Code.org is our newest course — and it's included in your membership at **no extra charge**! 🎉

### What to Expect
This is a fun, three-part course made up of three **1-hour sessions**. It covers all the basic terminology and skills to get you ready for hands-on challenges and real-world scenarios.

### Where It Takes You
This course is your launchpad! It prepares you for bigger adventures in:
* **🌐 Web App Development**
* **📡 IoT (Internet of Things)**
* **🔌 Embedded Design**
* **✨ And so much more!**

Start here and build the foundation for an awesome coding journey!

updates.title: User Portal is Live
updates.description:
The User Portal is officially live, and you can sign up to become a member today! Getting started is quick and easy.

### How to Get Started
* **Create an account**: Sign up and confirm your email to unlock the portal.
* **Buy credits & subscribe**: Grab some credits and pick your membership.
* **Use your benefits**: Join the free classes that come with the basic membership.
* **Spend your FYBIT credits**: Trade them for filament or kick off a 3D print!

### Need a Little Help?
* **Watch our videos**: Follow along with our [YouTube tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E8rDILmQb6M&list=PLqD3DJZs3fm57yyM-hkpIi_3VOyoYxDxx).
* **Read the guide**: Check out our [Getting Started page](https://fundedyouth.org/get-started).

updates.title: 🚀 A Brand-New Public Site!
updates.description:
We gave our **Public Site** a complete makeover from top to bottom! 🎨

### What's New
* **✨ Fresh Design**: A clean, modern look that's easier and more fun to use.
* **🎯 New Focus**: We're shining a spotlight on the [**FundedYouth Portal**](https://portal.fundedyouth.org), our STEM classes, and all the awesome services we offer.
* **📅 Live Schedule**: A brand-new live schedule connected right to the Portal, so you always know what's happening next.

### Become a Member
Our new site makes it super easy to **join and unlock great benefits**. Come explore everything FundedYouth has to offer!

updates.title: 📖 A Fresh New Look for Our Docs!
updates.description:
We gave [**docs.fundedyouth.org**](https://docs.fundedyouth.org) a brand-new look and feel to make finding answers easier than ever! ✨

### What's New
* **🧭 Easier Navigation**: We split everything into clear sections so you can find what you need fast — **Getting Started**, **FYBIT Credits**, **Courses**, **Portal**, **Legal**, and **Technical Details**.
* **🎨 Prettier Courses Pages**: We added custom formatting to the Courses pages, so they're cleaner and more fun to read.

### Take a Look
Come explore the new and improved docs — everything you need to know, all in one tidy place!

updates.title: 🎉 The Changelog App is Live!
updates.description:
Say hello to our brand-new **Changelog App** — your one-stop spot to see everything FundedYouth is building! 🚀

### What You Can Do
* **🔍 See the Latest**: Browse all our newest changes, fixes, and projects in one place.
* **📬 Subscribe to the Feed**: Never miss an update — follow along with our RSS feed.
* **👋 Follow Us**: Stay connected on social media or sign up to get updates by email.

### Stay in the Loop
This is your window into everything we're working on. Check back often to see what's new!
